feed.title: Minchin.ca - Comments: Voyages: To What End

entry.title: Posted by: Kyle P
entry.summary: I could not agree more. This summer I went on what I called a ‘pilgrimage’ to the Eastern States, namely New York, Pennsylvania, and The District of Columbia. I went alone and just explored, I was a great time to leave my comfort zone and reflect.
entry.content: I could not agree more. This summer I went on what I called a ‘pilgrimage’ to the Eastern States, namely New York, Pennsylvania, and The District of Columbia. I went alone and just explored, I was a great time to leave my comfort zone and reflect.

entry.title: Posted by: julie
entry.summary: I’ve never thought of California having such an opportunity for self-discovery and reflection. You have opened my eyes to the possibilities that exist there.
entry.content: I’ve never thought of California having such an opportunity for self-discovery and reflection. You have opened my eyes to the possibilities that exist there.
